title: lepidium hypenantion
intro: Lepidium hypenantion, also known as cress or pepper grass, is an annual plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is native to North America and has been used for its medicinal properties for centuries. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, congestion, and digestive issues. Lepidium hypenantion can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been traditionally used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections, as well as to support digestive health.
